title: Prospective ATOMS-EVA Test V1
question: Does the previously published ATOMS advantage over EVA replicate on a folio annotated after the protocol, models, metrics, and interpretation rules were frozen publicly?
result: Pending. Protocol frozen before annotation completion.
interpretation: The target folio is test-only; outcome will be classified only by preregistered rules.
limitations: Target annotation is still in progress
No metrics calculated at preregistration time
Same regional alignment limitations as REPRESENTATION-ALIGNMENT-V1
